holdings.infoBox: BRZU is an equity ETF with a total of 13 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily MSCI Brazil Bull 2X ETF (BRZU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Brazil 25-50 index. The fund provides 2x daily leveraged exposure to a market-cap-weighted index of large- and mid-cap Brazilian companies. BRZU was launched on Apr 10, 2013 and is issued by Direxion.
